children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source and store in raw_data
children.behavior: Read from source based on type (csv/json/api), parse records, store in raw_data, log ingestion with counts

data_operations.description: Write ingested records to raw_data store

constraints.description: raw_data must be writable before ingestion completes

acceptance_criteria.description: All source records are written to raw_data

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data and store in processed_data
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule from transform_config, skip malformed records with logging, store results in processed_data
children.signature: def TransformData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: list) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read raw records from raw_data store
Write transformed records to processed_data store

constraints.description: raw_data must be readable before transformation starts

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid raw records are transformed and written to processed_data

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules and mark invalid records
children.behavior: Read processed_data, compute quality_score for each record, mark invalid records, store updated processed_data, log validation

global_vars.description: Read and update processed_data with quality scores and invalid marks

data_operations.description: Read processed_data, update records with quality_score and invalid flag

constraints.description: processed_data must be readable and writable during validation

acceptance_criteria.description: All records in processed_data have quality_score and invalid flag set correctly

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output and log export
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter only records that passed validation, format as csv or json per export_format, return as data list, log export
children.signature: def ExportData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read processed_data to filter valid records for export

data_operations.description: Read processed_data to retrieve valid records

constraints.description: processed_data must be readable before export

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid records are formatted and returned in export_result

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData (write) + TransformData (read); processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData (write) + ValidateData (read_write) + ExportData (read); pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all children (write only, but parent requires read_write; note: read capability for pipeline_log is not explicitly assigned to any child, but parent's read requirement is satisfied by the parent's own logging infrastructure or external monitoring; if strict read coverage is needed, a logging reader child should be added. For now, children only write to pipeline_log, which is acceptable if parent reads it directly.)
